rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOROKHOV et al VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 2, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT RAYMOND BROWN, MACK WATSON and THETIUS PINKARD's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Continued to August 1, 2013. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of operative complaint to Department 501 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than July 19, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MESHA MONGE-IRIZARRY VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 2, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., and THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to July 16, 2013 per July 1, 2013 ex-parte order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CLIFFORD JUNG VS. HON LAM YEUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-842477 WITH CASE CGC-12-526785
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 2, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF CLIFFORD JUNG's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-842477 WITH CASE CGC-12-526785 DENIED. Moving party failed to carry his burden to provide sufficient information regarding commonality of issues of law and fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RINA BELLO VS. JAVIER TENORIO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 2, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT JAVIER TENORIO and MARIETTA TENORIO's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges provisions of the Lease on which it is based. Whether or not any alleged increases were lawful is an issue of fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MISSION STREET SF LLC et al VS. CHRISTIAN REAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notcie Of Motion And Moton To Compel Appearance At Depositions And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 2, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF MISSION STREET SF LLC and 1517 HOLDINGS LLC Notcie Of Motion And Moton To Compel Appearance At Depositions And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. Sanctions granted in the amount of $890. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANGELO WILSON VS. PHILLIP GARCIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Summons/Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 2, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT PHILLIP GARCIA Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Summons/Second Amended Complaint DENIED, 5 days to answer. CCP 1161(4) does not provide for the exact title of the notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. VS. CATALDA INTINARELLI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 2, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT CATALDA INTINARELLI MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Defendant shall file her answer no later than July 2, 2013 and post $2,115.32 no later than July 5, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BALWANTSIHN THAKOR VS. RAYMOND JASPER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 2, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT JASPER HAMMOND MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS GRANTED as follows: (1) Motion to Set Aside Default/Default Judgment is GRANTED; (2) Defendant shall file his answer and post $1, 900 with the Court no later than July 2, 2013 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)
